prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day horizon on large-cap stocks like SBUX, I assumed daily volatility of ~1.4% based on typical market conditions. Using a random walk model with normal distribution, the point estimate remains at current price with symmetric confidence intervals expanding based on time decay and volatility assumptions. 50% CI covers ~±1.4%, 80% CI covers ~±2.9%, and 90% CI covers ~±4.3% price movements.
